title: begonia coccinea
intro: Begonia coccinea, also known as the red Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the Begonia family, native to tropical Asia. The Begonia coccinea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Begonia coccinea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
